task_completion.description: Create pasubio_freight.rou.xml defining a vehicle named 'parcel_van_1' with vClass 'delivery', departing at 200s, and a route of at least 4 edges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of pasubio_freight.rou.xml with a vType 'delivery', a vehicle 'parcel_van_1' with depart='200', and a route containing at least 4 connected edges.

task_completion.description: Define two 60-second parcel drop-offs on different edges of the route, specifically on the rightmost lane (ending in '_0').
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the pasubio_freight.rou.xml file, two `<stop>` elements with `duration="60"` and `lane` attributes ending in `_0`, placed on different edges.

task_completion.description: Update run.sumocfg to include the new route file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing run.sumocfg with `<route-files value="...,pasubio_freight.rou.xml"/>` or a similar inclusion of the new route file.

task_completion.description: Run the SUMO simulation to generate the trip duration and route length.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of a SUMO command (e.g., `sumo -c run.sumocfg` or `sumo-gui`) and its output, or the SUMO GUI running the simulation.

task_completion.description: Record the trip duration and route length in ~/SUMO_Output/freight_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of freight_report.txt with exactly `van_trip_duration=<value>` and `van_route_length=<value>`.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the simulation to obtain the trip duration and route length.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing SUMO execution logs, tripinfo output generation, or a script extracting the values from SUMO outputs, rather than just guessing or hardcoding numbers.

integrity.description: The agent created the files in the exact directories specified.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands or file paths in editors showing `/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_freight.rou.xml` and `/home/ga/SUMO_Output/freight_report.txt`.
